prompt:
A 300 × 200 mm silicone soldering mat lies on a workbench, its surface divided into a central flat workspace and several small screw trays and compartments along the edges. A few screws, components, and a tiny PCB rest in the trays, while a soldering iron stand and tools sit safely on the heat-resistant central area. The mat is slightly textured and clearly thick enough (around 3 mm) to protect the bench, with no logos or text printed on it.

The scene is a near-future solarpunk electronics station with soft, even lighting, tidy shelves of parts in the background, and a plant adding a bit of green at the edge of the frame. The 512×512 image is photorealistic with gentle stylization, no logos or readable labels on the mat or tools, and a composition that centers the mat, its compartments, and the organized small parts while the rest of the workspace remains softly out of focus, emphasizing its role as a heat-resistant, anti-static work surface.
